/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libmj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/mj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/mj_interfaces/msg/detail/ip_interface__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mj_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/mj_interfaces/srv/detail/torque_srv__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
